_note: Sent to all members of a SubOrg when it is disabled by an admin
subject: SubOrg '{{.SubOrgName}}' Has Been Disabled
body_intro: The SubOrg '{{.SubOrgName}}' at {{.OrgName}} has been disabled. You can no longer create new job openings under this SubOrg.
body_detail: If you believe this was done in error, please contact your administrator.
footer: This is an automated message. Please do not reply.
